name: ONTRANS nicotinamide transplant-recipient skin-cancer trial
summary: A phase 3 randomized controlled trial testing oral nicotinamide for prevention of keratinocyte cancers and actinic keratoses in immunosuppressed solid-organ transplant recipients.
population: Solid-organ transplant recipients with at least two keratinocyte cancers in the previous 5 years

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for DNA Repair Enhancement because they can show whether the intervention changes health or disease-risk outcomes and safety in Solid-organ transplant recipients with at least two keratinocyte cancers in the previous 5 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
